title: Image To Image Traditional Face Reading Poster AI
sourceTitle: Image To Image Traditional Face Reading Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image traditional Chinese face-reading analysis poster for user-owned face photo for symbolic feature-map visualization, presented as symbolic entertainment visualization. Subject: The report focus traditional face-reading style visual annotation is expressed through facial guide lines, feature-region markers, and refined symbolic annotations while the uploaded portrait remains recognizable. Scene: Dark classical metaphysics poster environment with ancient-book atmosphere, I Ching inspired visual order, mysterious premium mood, and clean no-watermark presentation. Composition: Vertical analysis-report poster with the preserved face centered, at least ten numbered facial analysis points, face guide lines, feature regions, keyword tags, career and personality sections, entertainment disclaimer arranged as surrounding report modules, and clear links from face regions to concise text cards. Signature Elements: Preserved uploaded face, traditional face-reading style visual annotation, at least ten gold facial callouts, five-feature region markers, ancient-style annotation cards, face guide lines, feature regions, keyword tags, career and personality sections, entertainment disclaimer, and a non-deterministic entertainment framing. Style: Chinese classical metaphysics visual language with ancient manuscript influence, traditional destiny-chart aesthetics, thin gold linework, decorative report framing, and polished high-resolution poster finish. Color Palette: Deep dark background, warm gold analysis lines, restrained parchment or bronze accents, refined neutral module surfaces, and readable high-contrast text. Lighting: Low-key mystical illumination with subtle facial highlights, gold-line glow, clean edge separation, and enough contrast to read every callout. Typography: Chinese entertainment labels appear as short readable labels for wealth, personality, emotion, career, relationship, health, and social connection themes; keep annotations concise and clearly entertainment-oriented. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image traditional Chinese face-reading analysis poster for front-facing portrait supplied by the user with clear facial structure, presented as symbolic entertainment visualization. Subject: The report focus symbolic facial region map and temperament keywords is expressed through facial guide lines, feature-region markers, and refined symbolic annotations while the uploaded portrait remains recognizable. Scene: Dark classical metaphysics poster environment with ancient-book atmosphere, I Ching inspired visual order, mysterious premium mood, and clean no-watermark presentation. Composition: Vertical analysis-report poster with the preserved face centered, at least ten numbered facial analysis points, forehead, eyes, nose, mouth, jaw regions, short trait cards, non-deterministic note arranged as surrounding report modules, and clear links from face regions to concise text cards. Signature Elements: Preserved uploaded face, symbolic facial region map and temperament keywords, at least ten gold facial callouts, five-feature region markers, ancient-style annotation cards, forehead, eyes, nose, mouth, jaw regions, short trait cards, non-deterministic note, and a non-deterministic entertainment framing. Style: Chinese classical metaphysics visual language with ancient manuscript influence, traditional destiny-chart aesthetics, thin gold linework, decorative report framing, and polished high-resolution poster finish. Color Palette: Deep dark background, warm gold analysis lines, restrained parchment or bronze accents, refined neutral module surfaces, and readable high-contrast text. Lighting: Low-key mystical illumination with subtle facial highlights, gold-line glow, clean edge separation, and enough contrast to read every callout. Typography: Chinese entertainment labels appear as short readable labels for wealth, personality, emotion, career, relationship, health, and social connection themes; keep annotations concise and clearly entertainment-oriented. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
